2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 82
Date 05 July 2026
Time 19:38
Title Infringement - Race Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Race Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed GBR DOC 82 - Race Deleted Lap Times .pdf
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury

 
 
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 – 05 July 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 82 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  05 July 2026 
 
        Time  19:38 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Race 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 3, 5, 6, 9, 15 and 18. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 1 81  Oscar Piastri McLaren Mastercard F1 Team 15:05:47 PIT 
2 5 55  Carlos Sainz Atlassian Williams F1 Team 15:14:08 1:37.155 
3 15 55 Carlos Sainz Atlassian Williams F1 Team 15:16:43 1:37.177 
4 9 18 Lance Stroll Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 15:18:12 1:39.331 
5 6 27 Nico Hulkenberg Audi Revolut F1 Team 15:19:16 1:36.607 
6 9 18 Lance Stroll Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 15:1
